lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਸਭ ਸਾਜੀਅਨੁ ਆਪੇ ਵਰਤੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: aape srisatt sabh saajeean aape varateejai |
lines.english: He Himself created the entire universe, and He Himself is pervading it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਦਾ ਸਲਾਹੀਐ ਸਚੁ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sadaa salaaheeai sach keemat keejai |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs praise the Lord forever, and through the Truth, they assess Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣਾ ਠਾਕਿਆ ਸੁਖਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਵੀਜੈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: aavan jaanaa tthaakiaa sukh sehaj saveejai |7|
lines.english: Coming and going in reincarnation ceases, and one sleeps in peace and poise. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਕਮਲੁ ਬਿਗਾਸਿਆ ਇਵ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: gurasabadee kamal bigaasiaa iv har ras peejai |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, the heart-lotus blossoms forth, and in this way, one drinks in the sublime essence of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਮੈਲਾ ਨਾ ਧੁੰਧਲਾ ਨਾ ਭਗਵਾ ਨਾ ਕਚੁ ॥
lines.translit: naa mailaa naa dhundhalaa naa bhagavaa naa kach |
lines.english: Neither dirty, nor dull, nor saffron, nor any color that fades.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਲਾਲੋ ਲਾਲੁ ਹੈ ਸਚੈ ਰਤਾ ਸਚੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak laalo laal hai sachai rataa sach |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, crimson - deep crimson is the color of one who is imbued with the True Lord. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜਿ ਵਣਸਪਤਿ ਫੁਲੁ ਫਲੁ ਭਵਰੁ ਵਸੈ ਭੈ ਖੰਡਿ ॥
lines.translit: sehaj vanasapat ful fal bhavar vasai bhai khandd |
lines.english: The bumble bee intuitively and fearlessly dwells among the vegetation, flowers and fruits.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਰਵਰੁ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਏਕੋ ਫੁਲੁ ਭਿਰੰਗੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak taravar ek hai eko ful bhirang |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, there is only one tree, one flower, and one bumble bee. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸੇਤੀ ਸਦਾ ਮਿਲਿ ਰਹੇ ਜਿਨੀ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: har setee sadaa mil rahe jinee aap pachhaanaa |
lines.english: Those who realize their own selves, remain forever united with the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜਨ ਲੂਝਹਿ ਮਨੈ ਸਿਉ ਸੇ ਸੂਰੇ ਪਰਧਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: jo jan loojheh manai siau se soore paradhaanaa |
lines.english: Those humble beings who struggle with their minds are brave and distinguished heroes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਕਾ ਮਹਲੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਚੁ ਲਾਇ ਧਿਆਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo kaa mehal paaeaa sach laae dhiaanaa |
lines.english: They attain the Mansion of the Lord's Presence, and focus their meditation on the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨੀਆ ਕਾ ਇਹੁ ਮਹਤੁ ਹੈ ਮਨ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: giaaneea kaa ihu mehat hai man maeh samaanaa |
lines.english: This is the glory of the spiritual teachers, that they remain absorbed in their mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਗੀ ਹੋਵਾ ਜਗਿ ਭਵਾ ਘਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਭੀਖਿਆ ਲੇਉ ॥
lines.translit: jogee hovaa jag bhavaa ghar ghar bheekhiaa leo |
lines.english: If I were to become a Yogi, and wander around the world, begging from door to door,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਮਨੁ ਜੀਤਿਆ ਜਗੁ ਤਿਨਹਿ ਜਿਤਾਨਾ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: jin gur parasaadee man jeetiaa jag tineh jitaanaa |8|
lines.english: Those who conquer their own minds, by Guru's Grace, conquer the world. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਗਹ ਲੇਖਾ ਮੰਗੀਐ ਕਿਸੁ ਕਿਸੁ ਉਤਰੁ ਦੇਉ ॥
lines.translit: daragah lekhaa mangeeai kis kis utar deo |
lines.english: then, when I am summoned to the Court of the Lord, what answer could I give?

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਿਖਿਆ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਮੜੀ ਸਦਾ ਸਚੁ ਹੈ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: bhikhiaa naam santokh marree sadaa sach hai naal |
lines.english: The Naam, the Name of the Lord, is the charity I beg for; contentment is my temple. The True Lord is always with me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗਲਾ ਝੂਠੀਆ ਸਚਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮਾਲਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak galaa jhoottheea sachaa naam samaal |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, talk is false; contemplate the True Name. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੇਖੀ ਹਾਥ ਨ ਲਧੀਆ ਸਭ ਬਧੀ ਜਮਕਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: bhekhee haath na ladheea sabh badhee jamakaal |
lines.english: Nothing is obtained by wearing religious robes; all will be seized by the Messenger of Death.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਲੋੜਿ ਲਹੁ ਜਿਸੁ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: aisaa satigur lorr lahu jis jevadd avar na koe |
lines.english: Seek and find such a True Guru, who has no equal in His greatness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਦਰਿ ਲੇਖਾ ਮੰਗੀਐ ਸੋ ਦਰੁ ਸੇਵਿਹੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jit dar lekhaa mangeeai so dar sevihu na koe |
lines.english: Through that door, you will be called to account; do not serve at that door.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਏ ਸਚੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜੁ ਸਚਾ ਓਹੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: sach drirraae sach drirr sachaa ohu sabad dee |
lines.english: Truth is implanted within Him, and He implants Truth within others. He bestows the blessing of the True Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਛੂਟੀਐ ਲੇਖਾ ਮੰਗੈ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: tis saranaaee chhootteeai lekhaa mangai na koe |
lines.english: In His Sanctuary, one is released, and no one calls him to account.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਰਦੈ ਜਿਸ ਦੈ ਸਚੁ ਹੈ ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਭੀ ਸਚਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: hiradai jis dai sach hai tan man bhee sachaa hoe |
lines.english: One who has Truth within his heart - his body and mind are also true.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚੈ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਮੰਨਿਐ ਸਚੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak sachai hukam maniai sachee vaddiaaee dee |
lines.english: O Nanak, if one submits to the Hukam, the Command of the True Lord God, he is blessed with true glory and greatness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੇ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਵਸੀ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sache maeh samaavasee jis no nadar karee |2|
lines.english: He is immersed and merged in the True Lord, who blesses him with His Glance of Grace. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਰੇ ਏਹਿ ਨ ਆਖੀਅਹਿ ਅਹੰਕਾਰਿ ਮਰਹਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: soore ehi na aakheeeh ahankaar mareh dukh paaveh |
lines.english: They are not called heroes, who die of egotism, suffering in pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧੇ ਆਪੁ ਨ ਪਛਾਣਨੀ ਦੂਜੈ ਪਚਿ ਜਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: andhe aap na pachhaananee doojai pach jaaveh |
lines.english: The blind ones do not realize their own selves; in the love of duality, they rot.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਤਿ ਕਰੋਧ ਸਿਉ ਲੂਝਦੇ ਅਗੈ ਪਿਛੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: at karodh siau loojhade agai pichhai dukh paaveh |
lines.english: They struggle with great anger; here and hereafter, they suffer in pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਹੰਕਾਰਿ ਮੁਏ ਸੇ ਵਿਗਤੀ ਗਏ ਮਰਿ ਜਨਮਹਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਵਹਿ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: ahankaar mue se vigatee ge mar janameh fir aaveh |9|
lines.english: Those who die of egotism, shall not find salvation. They die, and are reborn in reincarnation. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੁ ਨ ਭਾਵਈ ਵੇਦ ਕੂਕਿ ਸੁਣਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo ahankaar na bhaavee ved kook sunaaveh |
lines.english: The Dear Lord is not pleased by egotism; the Vedas proclaim this clearly.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਗਉ ਹੋਇ ਨ ਊਜਲਾ ਲੋਹੇ ਨਾਵ ਨ ਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: kaagau hoe na aoojalaa lohe naav na paar |
lines.english: The crow does not become white, and an iron boat does not float across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰਮ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਮੰਨਿ ਲੈ ਧੰਨੁ ਸਵਾਰਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: piram padaarath man lai dhan savaaranahaar |
lines.english: One who puts his faith in the treasure of his Beloved Lord is blessed; he exalts and embellishes others as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਛੋਡੈ ਭੈ ਵਸੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਰਣੀ ਸਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: trisanaa chhoddai bhai vasai naanak karanee saar |1|
lines.english: Forsake thirst and desire, and abide in the Fear of God; O Nanak, these are the most excellent actions. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ਊਜਲਾ ਸਿਰਿ ਕਾਸਟ ਲੋਹਾ ਪਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: hukam pachhaanai aoojalaa sir kaasatt lohaa paar |
lines.english: One who realizes the Hukam of God's Command - his face is radiant and bright; he floats across, like iron upon wood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜੇ ਇਹੁ ਮਾਰੀਐ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: naanak je ihu maareeai gurasabadee veechaar |
lines.english: O Nanak, if this mind is to be conquered, one must contemplate the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਾਰਣ ਜੋ ਗਏ ਮਾਰਿ ਨ ਸਕਹਿ ਗਵਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo maaran jo ge maar na sakeh gavaar |
lines.english: The ignorant people who go to the desert to conquer their minds, are not able to conquer them.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਰਿਆ ਨਾ ਮਰੈ ਜੇ ਲੋਚੈ ਸਭੁ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: ehu man maariaa naa marai je lochai sabh koe |
lines.english: This mind is not conquered by conquering it, even though everyone longs to do so.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮਨ ਹੀ ਕਉ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਰਸੀ ਜੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟੈ ਸੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak man hee kau man maarasee je satigur bhettai soe |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the mind itself conquers the mind, if one meets with the True Guru. ||2||
